title: 24/7 HELPLINE - 211info
text: ALZHEIMER'S ASSOCIATION CENTRAL OREGON 24/7 HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care and support for those affected by Alzheimer's and other dementias. Funds, promotes, and supports Alzheimer's research aimed at treatment, prevention, and a cure. Also operates an informational helpline and provides information and referral services. 1080 SW Mount Bachelor Drive #100 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 272-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (800) 272-3900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, Harney, Jefferson, Lake, and Malheur Counties Services: Senior Advocacy Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Alzheimer's Disease Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COMMUNITY EDUCATION CLASSES AND EARLY-STAGE PROGRAMS MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALZHEIMER'S ASSOCIATION CENTRAL OREGON
